name: Cypress Bayou Dip
recipeIngredient: 4.5 oz can shrimp, broken and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in the microwave using the DEFROST setting.
2. In a 1 quart casserole dish, stir together the cream cheese, shrimp, ketchup, minced onion, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt until well blended.
3. Microwave for 4 to 6 minutes on DEFROST.
4. Serve with crackers.
